creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #7)
I don't understand. As mentioned twice, version 1.2 already
works with ffmpeg6. So, as I just indicated, when I get 1.2
into the tree. I can then move to moving this to support
a newer version of GTK. What am I missing here? I simply
want to get this back into the tree with my name on it. So
I can move this forward.
